FYI i had the phantom s7 series installed.

reviews.comment: To high drive to PGA county got it 200 $ cheaper

reviewReply.comment:
Generally, I would let a review like this roll down my back, but when someone who has never used our company leaves a 1* review at 12:44am on a Friday evening, I feel inclined to say something.

This world we live in is negative enough. When 29 out of your 34 posted public reviews are 1-2*, perhaps re-evaluate if it's necessary to do this to us or any other hard working business that's working to provide for our families. If you had a negative experience with us that warranted a 1* review, I'd own it. But simply because you wanted a cheaper price and were willing to drive over an hour each way is not a true reflection of our work and the service we provide.

reviews.comment: Frederick Window Tinting is the best place for tint! Joe and Sharyn are responsive, professional, fast, and overall just fantastic. They tinted my Fiat 500 Abarth 9 months ago and it still looks like it was done yesterday. The fit and finish of the tint is top notch and I’ve been extremely satisfied with the service and the product. It was my first time having a car tinted and the whole process was painless, they handled everything quickly and easily. I couldn’t be happier with my experience at FWT!
